name: IAM Security Posture
description: Identity and access management security posture summary showing access controls and credential hygiene.

source.description: Source system (e.g., AWS IAM, Azure AD, GCP IAM)

export_date.description: Date the IAM configuration was exported (YYYY-MM-DD)

mfa_enforced.description: Whether MFA is enforced for all users

root_account_mfa.description: Whether root/admin account has MFA enabled

examples.name: aws-iam-basic
examples.description: AWS IAM configuration with MFA enabled and no stale credentials

examples.name: aws-iam-stale-credentials
examples.description: AWS IAM with unused credentials older than 90 days

examples.name: aws-iam-no-root-mfa
examples.description: AWS IAM with root account missing MFA

examples.name: gcp-iam-basic
examples.description: GCP IAM configuration with organization-wide MFA
